Thanks for contributing! Two things before you open this PR:
1. Target branch must be `dev` — `main` is release-only (see CONTRIBUTING.md).
2. Link the issue this PR resolves.

## What does this PR do?

Closes #

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets the `dev` branch (not `main`)
- [ ] `uv run pytest tests/ -q` passes locally — tests must run offline (no network, no `claude` CLI)
- [ ] New/changed behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] The linked issue's acceptance criteria are all satisfied
- [ ] `uvx ruff check .` passes
